title: Introduction to Docker Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the basics of Docker containers.

questions.question: What is the primary role of Docker in modern software development?
options: To package your project's code and all of its dependencies into a single, portable, and consistent container

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is a key benefit of using a Docker container instead of a traditional virtual machine?
options: Its lightweight, portable, and consumes fewer system resources
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
